channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overflowing bin, 23rd March
item.description:
Overflowing bin needs emptying I’m sharing a what3words address to help you find this specific location. Tap to see exactly where it is: ///teeth.sorters.puddles https://w3w.co/teeth.sorters.puddles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forsyth Gardens, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dump, 23rd March
item.description:
Rubbish everywhere Bexley council doing a great job of not cleaning up.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Manorway, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Idling for over 20 minutes!, 23rd March
item.description:
HGV parked on residential road, idling and polluting the street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Oakington Road, Kensal Town, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress, 23rd March
item.description:
Mattress flytipped I’m sharing a what3words address to help you find this specific location. Tap to see exactly where it is: ///powers.vibrate.moves https://w3w.co/powers.vibrate.moves

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forsyth Gardens, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: General flytipping of builders waste, 23rd March
item.description:
General flytipping of builders waste - old wooden door etc. I’m sharing a what3words address to help you find this specific location. Tap to see exactly where it is: ///rank.wedge.mats https://w3w.co/rank.wedge.mats

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cook's Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Cars parked incorrectly, 23rd March
item.description:
Cars on the car lot over hang leading to pathway narrow especially with pushchairs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Hall Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Winchester ave and Willesden lane., 23rd March
item.description:
Pretouch

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken fence in the park, 23rd March
item.description:
I think this was broken by the men who came to cut down dead trees last week
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halt Robin Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti to be painted over, 23rd March
item.description:
Please can this graffiti be painted over. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The road at the back of the memorial gardens is not being cleaned., 23rd March
item.description:
I I reported this problem last week and it appears no one has done any street cleaning in Lloyd villas/Lewisham Way in the section behind the memorial Gardens since then. The gardens themselves have been cleaned but there is a lot of litter at the back in hedges and under the growth near the wall that butts the road this also needs to be cleared regularly because unfortunately people seem to drop a lot of litter in this area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Manor Avenue, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A tree with long low hanging branches on BR1 3EN Rafford way houses between 47 & 49, 23rd March
item.description:
The tree needs pruning to avoid driveway issues with vehicles and to avoided low hanging branches and broken branches across driveway and walkways.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rafford Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Worn grass verges, 23rd March
item.description:
The grass verges - from the pedestrian crossing by Chislehurst & Sidcup School to Greenwood Close - are all damaged. Please can a solution be found to repair/replace. This short section of pedestrian area has footfall in the hundreds daily.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small pile of fallen and broken branches, 23rd March
item.description:
Please can this small pile of branches be removed. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter damaged and leaning, 23rd March
item.description:
The bus shelter was apparently hit by a vehicle and is leaning and damaged. I reported this in December last year and have spoken with and written to tfl several times since. Apart from putting up warning tape, nothing has been done. THIS NEEDS REPLACING. WHY HAS IT TAKEN OVER THREE MONTHS TO DO NOTHING??!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Tottenham Lane, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pile of broken branches, 23rd March
item.description:
Please can this large pile of broken branches be cleared away. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins overflowing again - please can they be emptied, 23rd March
item.description:
Please can our litter bins be emptied. They are full and overflowing again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous bits dropping on my property causing damage, 23rd March
item.description:
No-one ever seems to maintain the tres behind the houses- if it’s private land then please inform me of who I need to contact or ask them to allow me permission to go on to the land to cut this tree down! My grandchildren were playing out and a large piece fell into my garden missing them by inches but damaging my shed roof - the tree is very dangerous and very weak - this has been for over 5 years now and it’s getting bigger but weaker

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gilbert Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping behind abandoned van, 23rd March
item.description:
Furniture dumped behind abandoned van, please collect the items. Please also note that whilst residents have reported this abandoned van in the past, the fact it has road tax is so to avoid it being towed away. It is abandoned and a fire risk. So whilst its on the road, it is not registered SORN, does not have a MOT, a risk to residents and a hot-spot for flytipping.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Cross Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double mattress flytipped on the junction of Riverdale Road and Stiles Road, 23rd March
item.description:
Double mattress flytipped on the junction of Riverdale Road and Stiles Road - please can this be collected asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp on at 10am, 23rd March
item.description:
Lamp on at 10am

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Bushey Way, Park Langley, Greater London
